title: Toast
subtitle: Temporary non-intrusive notifications for user feedback

basic.title: Basic toasts
basic.description: Show simple notifications with different types: success, error, warning and info.

withTitle.title: Toasts with title
withTitle.description: Add a title to give more context to the notification.

withActions.title: Toasts with actions
withActions.description: Include action buttons so the user can interact with the notification.

positions.title: Positions
positions.description: Control where toasts appear on screen: top-left, top-center, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-center, bottom-right.

iconTop.title: Icon at the top
iconTop.description: Displays the toast icon centered at the top for a more prominent design.
iconTop.note: Use the iconPosition='top' property to center the icon at the top of the toast. This is especially useful for toasts with titles and actions, as it improves visual hierarchy and makes the icon more prominent.

icons.title: Custom icons
icons.description: You can display default icons based on the toast type or use custom icons. You can even hide the icon if desired.
icons.note: Use the icon property. If you use the value false, the icon will be hidden. If you use a string, you can specify a custom Remix Icon. By default, icons are shown based on the toast type with icon set to true.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: Configure how long the toast remains visible before disappearing. Use 0 for toasts that do not close automatically.

loading.title: Loading toast
loading.description: Shows a toast with loading state that can be dynamically updated when the operation completes.

service.title: ToastService
service.description: Main service for showing toast notifications. Provides methods to create, update and close toasts.

custom.description: Shows a generic/custom toast with secondary styling.

loading.description: Shows a persistent loading toast (no timeout, no close button) that can be updated when the operation completes.

promise.description: Wraps a promise: shows a loading toast while pending, then automatically transitions to success or danger based on the result.

update.description: Updates an existing toast by ID with new configuration options.

close.description: Closes a specific toast by its ID.

closeGroup.description: Closes all toasts belonging to a named group.

closeByType.description: Closes all active toasts of a specific type.

get.description: Returns the ToastRef for a specific toast by ID, or undefined if not found.

getActive.description: Returns the array of all currently active ToastRef instances.

getGroup.description: Returns all active ToastRef instances belonging to a named group.

clearPersistent.description: Clears persisted toast data from localStorage.

ref.title: ToastRef
ref.description: Reference object returned by each toast creation method. Provides control and lifecycle hooks for an individual toast.

close.description: Programmatically closes the toast, triggering the exit animation.

update.description: Updates the toast configuration reactively (message, type, timeout, etc.).

resume.description: Resumes the auto-close timeout from the remaining time.

resetTimeout.description: Resets and restarts the auto-close timeout from the beginning.

toggleExpanded.description: Toggles the expanded state of an expandable toast.

getState.description: Returns a snapshot of the current toast state (id, type, config, timeRemaining, isPaused, etc.).

afterClosed.description: Observable that emits once when the toast has fully closed and been removed.

afterShown.description: Observable that emits once when the toast has finished its entrance animation.

onPause.description: Observable that emits every time the toast timeout is paused.

onResume.description: Observable that emits every time the toast timeout is resumed.

config.title: ToastConfig
config.description: Individual per-toast configuration interface. Allows overriding global configuration for specific toasts.

type.description: Toast type that controls the color scheme and default icon (success, danger, warning, info, etc.).

title.description: Optional title displayed above the message.

message.description: Main text content of the toast.

html.description: Raw HTML content rendered inside the toast (sanitized). Use with caution.

template.description: Angular TemplateRef rendered as the toast content.

templateContext.description: Data object passed as context to the custom template.

templateMode.description: Controls how a custom template is inserted: replace replaces all standard content, append adds the template after.

icon.description: Controls the icon: true uses the default type icon, false hides it, a string sets a custom icon class.

iconPosition.description: Position of the icon relative to the content: left (inline) or top (centered above).

toastClass.description: One or more additional CSS classes applied to the toast host element.

action.description: Primary action button configuration (label, onClick, closeOnClick).

actions.description: Array of additional action button configurations.

timeout.description: Duration in milliseconds before the toast auto-closes. Use 0 to keep it open until dismissed manually.

progressBar.description: Shows a progress bar indicating the remaining display time.

closeButton.description: Shows a close button on the toast.

pauseOnHover.description: Pauses the auto-close timer when the cursor is over the toast.

pauseOnFocusLoss.description: Pauses the auto-close timer when the browser window loses focus.

closeOnTouch.description: Closes the toast when the user taps or clicks on its body.

swipeToDismiss.description: Allows the user to dismiss the toast by swiping horizontally on touch devices.

swipeThreshold.description: Minimum horizontal swipe distance in pixels required to dismiss the toast.

position.description: Overrides the global container position for this specific toast.

animationDuration.description: Duration of enter and exit animations in milliseconds.

group.description: Logical group name used to manage related toasts together (e.g. close by group).

priority.description: Priority value used when replacing the lowest-priority toast on overflow.

id.description: Custom unique ID for the toast, useful for targeting it with update() or close().

persistent.description: Persists the toast to localStorage so it reappears after a page reload.

persistentId.description: Unique key used to store and retrieve the persistent toast from localStorage.

expandable.description: Allows the toast to be expanded in place to reveal additional content.

expandedContent.description: Additional content shown when the toast is expanded (string or TemplateRef).

sound.description: Plays a sound when the toast appears: true for the default sound, or a URL string for a custom audio file.

requireOnline.description: Queues the toast and only displays it when the browser is back online.

ariaRole.description: ARIA role applied to the toast element (status, alert, or log).

ariaLive.description: ARIA live politeness level for screen reader announcements.

announceToScreenReader.description: Whether the toast is announced to assistive technologies via a live region.

buttonsSize.description: Size of the action buttons inside the toast.

buttonsColor.description: Color of the action buttons. Defaults to the toast type color.

buttonsVariant.description: Visual variant applied to action buttons.

onShown.description: Callback executed after the toast finishes its entrance animation.

onClosed.description: Callback executed when the toast is closed.

onClick.description: Callback executed when the user clicks on the toast body.

onTimeout.description: Callback executed when the toast auto-close timeout expires.

onPause.description: Callback executed when the auto-close timer is paused.

onResume.description: Callback executed when the auto-close timer is resumed.

global.title: Global configuration
global.description: Global configuration for the toast system. Can be set during application initialization.

timeout.description: Default duration in milliseconds before a toast auto-closes. Use 0 for persistent toasts.

position.description: Default screen position for all toast containers.

preventDuplicates.description: Suppresses new toasts that have the same type, title, and message as an already active toast.

progressBar.description: Shows a progress bar on all toasts by default.

closeButton.description: Shows a close button on all toasts by default.

closeOnTouch.description: Dismisses the toast when the user clicks or taps on its body.

icon.description: Shows the type icon on all toasts by default.

iconPosition.description: Default position of the icon relative to the toast content.

pauseOnHover.description: Pauses the auto-close timer when the cursor hovers over the toast.

pauseOnFocusLoss.description: Pauses the auto-close timer when the browser window loses focus.

maxToasts.description: Maximum total number of toasts visible simultaneously across all positions.

maxToastsPerPosition.description: Maximum number of toasts visible at the same position simultaneously.

stackingBehavior.description: Behaviour when the maximum toast count is reached: queue (waits), replace-oldest, replace-lowest-priority, or ignore.

stackDirection.description: Whether new toasts are appended at the bottom or prepended at the top of the stack.

animationIn.description: Default entrance animation for all toasts.

animationOut.description: Default exit animation for all toasts.

animationDuration.description: Duration of enter and exit animations in milliseconds.

templateMode.description: Default mode for custom templates: replace or append.

announceToScreenReader.description: Whether toasts are announced to assistive technologies via a live region.

ariaRole.description: Default ARIA role applied to toast elements.

ariaLive.description: Default ARIA live politeness level for toast announcements.

sound.description: Plays an audio notification when a toast appears.

expandable.description: Allows toasts to be expanded in place to reveal additional content.

persistent.description: Persists toasts to localStorage so they reappear after a page reload.

swipeToDismiss.description: Allows users to dismiss toasts by swiping horizontally on touch devices.

swipeThreshold.description: Minimum horizontal swipe distance in pixels required to dismiss a toast.

icons.description: Custom icon class overrides for each toast type (success, danger, warning, info, loading).

buttonsSize.description: Default size for action buttons inside toasts.

buttonsColor.description: Default color for action buttons. If not set, the toast type color is used.

buttonsVariant.description: Default visual variant for action buttons.

types.title: Types and interfaces
types.description: TypeScript type definitions for the toast system: ToastType, ToastPosition, ToastAction, ToastRef.

usage.title: Complete usage example
usage.description: Complete example integrating ToastService into a component with different usage scenarios.

layout.title: Layout variables
layout.description: CSS variables to customize the toast dimensions and internal spacing.

width.description: Default width of each toast notification.

widthMobile.description: Width of the toast on viewports narrower than 640 px.

minHeight.description: Minimum height of the toast element.

maxWidth.description: Maximum width of the toast container on larger screens.

padding.description: Internal padding applied to the toast body.

paddingCompact.description: Reduced internal padding used in compact toast variants.

gap.description: Gap between the icon and the text content inside the toast.

border.title: Border and shadow variables
border.description: CSS variables to customize the toast border radius, border width, and drop shadow.

radius.description: Border radius applied to the toast element.

shadow.description: Box shadow applied to the toast element.

typography.title: Typography variables
typography.description: CSS variables to customize toast text (title and message font size and weight).

titleSize.description: Font size of the toast title.

titleWeight.description: Font weight of the toast title.

messageSize.description: Font size of the toast message.

messageWeight.description: Font weight of the toast message.

animations.title: Animation variables
animations.description: CSS variables to customize toast enter/exit animation timing.

duration.description: Duration of the toast enter and exit animations.

easing.description: CSS easing function used for toast enter and exit animations.

zindex.title: Z-index variable
zindex.description: CSS variable that controls the stacking layer of the toast container.

zIndex.description: Z-index of the toast overlay container. Defaults to the global status z-index token.

stacking.title: Stacking variables
stacking.description: CSS variables that control the visual stacking effect when multiple toasts are grouped together.

stackGap.description: Vertical gap between stacked toast notifications.

stackScale1.description: Scale factor applied to the second toast in the stack (one level behind).

stackScale2.description: Scale factor applied to the third toast in the stack (two levels behind).

stackY1.description: Vertical offset applied to the second toast in the stack.

stackY2.description: Vertical offset applied to the third toast in the stack.

colors.title: Per-color variables
colors.description: CSS variables generated by the theme engine for each semantic color (success, warning, danger, info, primary, neutral). Replace {color} with the color name.

colorBg.description: Background color of the toast for the given color variant.
colorBg.default: Generated by theme engine from the color's tint/shade

colorHoverBg.description: Background color on hover for the given color variant.
colorHoverBg.default: Generated by theme engine from the color's tint/shade

colorBorder.description: Border color of the toast for the given color variant.
colorBorder.default: Generated by theme engine as a semi-transparent tint of the color

colorTitle.description: Title text color for the given color variant.
colorTitle.default: Generated by theme engine from the color's shade/tint

colorIcon.description: Icon color for the given color variant.

colorText.description: Body text color for the given color variant.
colorText.default: White in dark mode, black in light mode

colorProgress.description: Progress bar color for the given color variant.
colorProgress.default: The raw color value for the variant

examples.title: Customization example
examples.description: Toast customization examples using CSS variables to adjust layout, border, and animation.

tokens.title: Translation tokens
tokens.description: The Toast component uses generic tokens (close, expand, collapse) from NuiI18nService for button labels, and the component-specific toast.notifications token for the container's accessible region label.
tokens.note: All four tokens are overridden globally via provideNuiI18n() in your app.config.ts. The generic tokens (close, expand, collapse) are shared across multiple components so overriding them localises all matching buttons at once. There is no per-instance override available through ToastConfig.

close.description: Accessible label for the close button on dismissible toasts.

expand.description: Accessible label for the expand button on expandable toasts.

collapse.description: Accessible label for the collapse button when an expandable toast is open.

notifications.description: Accessible label for the toast container's live region (announced to screen readers when the container is rendered).

roles.title: ARIA roles and attributes
roles.description: Toasts use a live region so screen readers announce new notifications without interrupting the user's current focus.

ariaLive.description: The toast element carries aria-live="polite" for informational notifications or "assertive" for critical alerts (error/warning).

ariaAtomic.description: aria-atomic="true" ensures the screen reader announces the complete toast content as a single unit.

ariaLabel.description: The accessible name of the toast is automatically derived from its content following the priority: title → message → type.

closeLabel.description: The close button uses the i18n token close as its accessible label.

naming.title: Accessible name
naming.description: The toast's accessible name is automatically derived from its content. No explicit aria-label is needed from the consumer.
naming.note: Always provide meaningful title or message content. Avoid toasts that rely solely on color or icon to convey their meaning.

hostTitle.description: When a title is provided, it becomes the accessible label of the toast.

hostMessage.description: When there is no title, the message text becomes the accessible label.

hostType.description: When there is neither title nor message, the toast type is used as the fallback label.

keyboard.title: Keyboard interaction
keyboard.description: Toasts are non-modal. Focus does not move to them automatically; users can Tab to the close button if desired.

tab.description: Tab moves focus to the close button inside the toast if one is visible.

enterSpace.description: Activates the focused close button, dismissing the toast.

setup.title: Global configuration
setup.description: Set default values for all Toast notifications in your application using the provideNUI() function. Any property defined here is automatically applied to every toast that does not override it at call time.
setup.note: Only the properties you want to override need to be defined. Properties not specified fall back to the library defaults.

defaults.title: Configurable properties
defaults.description: Full list of configurable properties through ToastGlobalConfig, their types and the library defaults.

rows.timeout: Duration in milliseconds before the toast is automatically dismissed (0 = persistent)
rows.preventDuplicates: Whether duplicate toasts with identical content are suppressed
rows.progressBar: Whether a progress bar indicating remaining display time is shown
rows.closeButton: Whether a close button is rendered on each toast
rows.closeOnTouch: Whether tapping or clicking the toast body dismisses it
rows.maxToasts: Maximum total number of toasts visible simultaneously across all positions
rows.maxToastsPerPosition: Maximum number of toasts visible at the same position
rows.animationIn: Animation used when a toast enters
rows.animationOut: Animation used when a toast leaves
rows.animationDuration: Duration of enter and leave animations in milliseconds
rows.pauseOnHover: Whether the dismiss timer pauses while the cursor is over the toast
rows.pauseOnFocusLoss: Whether the dismiss timer pauses while the document does not have focus
rows.stackingBehavior: Behaviour when the maximum toast count is reached
rows.stackDirection: Whether new toasts are prepended or appended to the list
rows.icon: Whether the type icon is shown inside the toast
rows.iconPosition: Side of the toast body where the icon is displayed
rows.announceToScreenReader: Whether toasts are announced to assistive technologies
rows.ariaRole: ARIA role applied to the toast live region
rows.ariaLive: ARIA live politeness level of the toast announcements
rows.persistent: Whether toasts remain on screen until explicitly dismissed
rows.expandable: Whether long messages can be expanded in place
rows.swipeToDismiss: Whether a swipe gesture can dismiss the toast on touch devices
rows.swipeThreshold: Minimum horizontal swipe distance in pixels required to dismiss
rows.sound: Whether an audio notification is played when a toast appears
rows.templateMode: How a custom template is inserted relative to the default toast content
rows.icons: Custom icon definitions for each toast type (success, danger, warning, info, loading)
rows.buttonsSize: Size of action buttons rendered inside the toast
rows.buttonsVariant: Visual variant of action buttons rendered inside the toast
rows.buttonsShape: Shape of action buttons rendered inside the toast

priority.title: Resolution priority
priority.description: Values are resolved following a strict three-level priority chain. The first matching level wins: call-time options > global config > library default.
priority.note: The priority chain guarantees that toasts always have valid resolved values. Options passed at call time always win; if not provided, the global config value is used; if not configured either, the library default is applied.
